query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE 'rockin%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'emergency%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'hybridcast%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'analytics%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'policy%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE 'rockin%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'emergency%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'hybridcast%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'analytics%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE 'policy%';
